# ESG Ratings Improvement & Net-Zero Targets

This engagement addresses Initech's two most pressing ESG priorities: closing the pay-equity disclosure gap flagged in the MSCI methodology review, and committing to SBTi-validated near-term science-based targets. The pay-equity workstream involves HR data harmonization and the authoring of a new public disclosure aligned with MSCI's criteria. The SBTi workstream is developing absolute emission reduction targets across Scopes 1, 2, and material Scope 3 categories for the 2030 horizon. Biweekly calls with Priya and Tom coordinate across investor relations and operations.
